title: German Crunchy Rye Roll
description: A delicious and crunchy German-inspired rye roll recipe with a crispy texture and a hint of sweetness.

ingredients.name: rye flour
ingredients.notes: use 100% rye flour for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: warm water to help yeast activate

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: a hint of sweetness to balance flavors

ingredients.name: crunchy roll topping
ingredients.notes: a mix of sesame seeds, poppy seeds, and chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.notes: melted butter for egg wash and brushing

instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour, yeast, and salt. Whisk to incorporate.
2. Gradually add warm water and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
6. Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces.
7. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it into a disk shape.
8. Brush the tops with melted butter and sprinkle with crunchy roll topping.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the rolls are golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before serving.
